items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️Gucci Horsebit Chain series small shoulder bag. Gucci reinterprets brand classic elements, cleverly blending heritage design with fashion creativity to showcase contemporary aesthetic concepts. This handbag is exquisitely embellished with the bit chain design that was popular in the early 2000s, inheriting the brand's classic style. The 2023 Fall/Winter series reinterprets this model, using various colors and textures to highlight a modern style. Light blue quilted leather, palladium hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, bit chain, interior: one card slot and one pocket, detachable leather strap (23cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (19cm high), magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:

The 2023 Fall/Winter series reinterprets this model, using various colors and textures to highlight a modern style. Light blue quilted leather, palladium hardware. Silk lining, bit chain, interior: one card slot and one pocket, detachable leather strap (23cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (19cm high), magnetic snap closure.
Model: 764339.
Size: 11.5(L)x 27(W)x 5cm(D)
Color: Iridescent Blue/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick

items.name_en: MCM New Soft Berlin Visetos Shoulder Bag, embodying the concept of combining elegance with portability, this bag is meticulously crafted as a miniaturized version of a classic suitcase. Nappa leather details and the edge-painted corners outlining the classic Visetos silhouette highlight the brand's craftsmanship. A double-zipper closure ensures the safety of small daily essentials inside the luxurious fabric lining. You can carry this exquisite bag by the soft leather handle or use the leather shoulder strap for hands-free functionality. Dimensions: 14-21-8, Style No.: 65014

items.name_en: Exclusive real shot 🎬 HD copper hardware. Can be used on the side with the gingham print lining. Adjustable side drawstring silhouette, with removable inner pocket. Top leather double handles, side drawstring to tighten the opening. Includes removable zippered pouch with shoulder strap. Latest large reversible shopper, mother-daughter shoulder bag Visetos Liz. Dimensions: Large shopper 36*28*17, Small shoulder bag 29*21. Style 65007

items.name_en: Brand new mini shopper basket, can hold all your small essentials. Cotton canvas lining with a street fashion-inspired print pattern. Comes with an included crossbody strap for hands-free functionality and better portability. Dimensions: 18.5-19-9.5, Style 65001
